question: Identify all transformers in the fleet currently showing degraded or poor health status. For each flagged asset, retrieve its nameplate data and summarize which units require prioritized attention.
answer:
The transformers in the fleet currently showing degraded or poor health status are T-011, T-012, T-013, T-014, and T-015.
Their nameplate data shows the following units require prioritized attention:

* T-011: Load Current (A), Oil Temperature (°C), Power Factor, HV Voltage (kV), LV Voltage (kV), Winding Temperature (°C)
* T-012: Load Current (A), Oil Temperature (°C), Power Factor, HV Voltage (kV), LV Voltage (kV), Winding Temperature (°C)
* T-013: Load Current (A), Oil Temperature (°C), Power Factor, HV Voltage (kV), LV Voltage (kV), Winding Temperature (°C)
* T-014: Load Current (A), Oil Temperature (°C), Power Factor, HV Voltage (kV), LV Voltage (kV), Winding Temperature (°C)
* T-015: Load Current (A), Oil Temperature (°C), Power Factor, HV Voltage (kV), LV Voltage (kV), Winding Temperature (°C)

These units require regular monitoring and maintenance to prevent further degradation.

scenario.text: Identify all transformers in the fleet currently showing degraded or poor health status. For each flagged asset, retrieve its nameplate data and summarize which units require prioritized attention.
scenario.characteristic_form: The answer should enumerate degraded assets by ID, include nameplate metadata for each, and rank or flag the units most in need of follow-up.
